Python Code:
def plot_map(gdf, column, cmap="RdYlBu_r", title=None, figsize=(12, 10)):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize)

    gdf.plot(
        column=column,
        ax=ax,
        cmap=cmap,
        legend=True,
        linewidth=0.2,
        edgecolor="black"
        )

    ax.set_axis_off()
    ax.set_title(title or column, fontsize=16)
    plt.show()
Annotations: This section of code creates a tool that serves as the template for all other maps to be plotted so that only the columns and sick equations have to be imput to change the type of disaste and state
